scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:1: dotenv -e stack1.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:2: dotenv -e stack2.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:3: dotenv -e stack3.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:4: dotenv -e stack4.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:5: dotenv -e stack5.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.dev:prod: dotenv -e stack-prod.env -- concurrently -n backend,ui,ui2 -c auto "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/ui run dev"  "npm -w apps/ui2 run dev"
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker-compose down && docker-compose build && docker-compose up -d
scripts.build:packages: npm -w packages/events run build && npm -w packages/errors run build && npm -w packages/adk-session-store run build
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:packages && npm -w apps/backend run build:prod && npm -w packages/client run build:prod && npm -w apps/ui2 run build:prod && npm -w apps/ui run build:prod && npm -w apps/worker run build:prod
scripts.taico:worker:1: dotenv -e stack1.env -- sh -c 'npm -w apps/backend run start:prod -- --worker --serverurl ${ISSUER_URL}'
scripts.taico:worker:2: dotenv -e stack2.env -- sh -c 'npm -w apps/backend run start:prod -- --worker --serverurl ${ISSUER_URL}'
scripts.taico:worker:3: dotenv -e stack3.env -- sh -c 'npm -w apps/backend run start:prod -- --worker --serverurl ${ISSUER_URL}'
scripts.taico:worker:4: dotenv -e stack4.env -- sh -c 'npm -w apps/backend run start:prod -- --worker --serverurl ${ISSUER_URL}'
scripts.taico:worker:5: dotenv -e stack5.env -- sh -c 'npm -w apps/backend run start:prod -- --worker --serverurl ${ISSUER_URL}'
scripts.release:backend: npm run zero-to-prod && npm -w apps/backend run release
